chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: Hi, this is Riya calling from the insurer regarding your policy renewal.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: Sorry, can you repeat that, the line is breaking up.

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: Sure — I'm calling about your policy renewal, is now a good time?

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: Um, yeah I think so, hold on, my kid is asking me something.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: Okay sorry, I'm back. What was the question again?

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: No problem. Your renewal date is coming up next month, just confirming your details are current.

chunks.speaker: customer
chunks.text: Yeah I think everything is the same, nothing has changed on my end.

chunks.speaker: agent
chunks.text: Great, that's all I needed. Have a good day.
